==Biography==
Cheese joined [[Team Immunity]] after [[Swip3rR]], [[Spookz]], [[Swiffer]], [[Raydere]] and [[Rosey]] left to form their own organization, [[Exodus Gaming]]. At the end of the season, Team Immunity were stripped of their team, and Cheese joined [[The Chiefs eSports Club]] as the mid laner while Swiffer was away.

== Trivia ==
* Known for extensive Swain play in previous years.
* Was born in Sydney, Australia, but lived in England and Singapore for a large portion of his childhood.
